intent_precise: Illumina Nextera XT NGS Prep 4: Pool Libraries: Using Load Plate (pcr_plate, slot 1), Tube Rack with 2mL Tube(s) (tuberack, slot 2). (1) Transfer from source A1 to destination A1.
intent: For the library pooling step of the Illumina Nextera XT NGS Prep, you'll need to set up your deck with the PCR plate containing your prepared libraries in slot 1 and the 2mL tube rack in slot 2. Simply transfer the contents from well A1 on the PCR plate to tube A1 in the tube rack - this will be your pooled library sample ready for the next step in the workflow.

output_schema.protocol_name: Illumina Nextera XT NGS Prep 4: Pool Libraries
output_schema.author: Opentrons <protocols@opentrons.com>
